extra.auto.1_came_for_the_views_and_they: "Came for the views and they exceeded expectations. Ortaköy Mosque glowing, Dolmabahçe lit up, the bridge turning red — some of my best Istanbul night shots."
extra.auto.2_istanbul_da_ya_yorum_ama_il: "Istanbul'da yaşıyorum ama ilk kez böyle bir tur denedim. Yurtdışından gelen misafirlerimle gittik, hepsi çok beğendi. Profesyonel bir organizasyon."
extra.auto.3_our_anniversary_dinner_was_: "Our anniversary dinner was unforgettable. Candle-lit mezes, attentive service, the Bosphorus in the background — every bite felt special."
extra.auto.4_the_belly_dance_performance: "The belly dance performance was incredible. The dancer commanded the whole room — pure artistry. I was on a solo trip and felt welcomed the entire evening."
extra.auto.8_21_00_3_hours_full_dinner_t: (21:00, 3 hours — full dinner, Turkish night show with Whirling Dervish, belly dance, folk dances, live music and DJ, plus stunning night views). Departs from Kabataş Pier.
extra.auto.9_15_person_wine_beer_rak_vod: +€15/person · Wine, beer, rakı, vodka, or gin
extra.auto.10_30_person_wine_beer_rak_vo: +€30/person · Wine, beer, rakı, vodka, gin all night
extra.auto.12_0_3_age_free_4_8_age_50_of: 0-3 age: Free | 4-8 age: 50% off | 9+ age: Full price
extra.auto.33_all_guests_are_dropped_off: All guests are dropped off at
extra.auto.34_celebrating_something_spec: Celebrating something special? We offer romantic table setup with candles & flowers (+€15) and birthday celebrations. Tell us!
extra.auto.41_if_you_selected_hotel_tran: If you selected hotel transfer, please be ready at your hotel lobby by
extra.auto.43_live_singer_performances_t: Live singer performances, traditional Turkish night show with folk dances, belly dance, and DJ music. Entertainment runs until 21:00.
extra.auto.45_no_prepayment_is_required_: No prepayment is required. You pay directly on the boat before or during the cruise. We accept cash (EUR, TRY, USD) and credit cards.
extra.auto.56_the_meeting_point_depends_: The meeting point depends on which cruise you book. After your reservation is confirmed, we'll send you the exact location with a Google Maps pin on WhatsApp, along with clear directions.
extra.auto.68_warm_appetizer_crispy_past: Warm appetizer: crispy pastry rolls with cured beef & cheese
extra.auto.74_yes_hotel_transfer_is_avai: Yes! Hotel transfer is available for +€10 per person, including pickup and drop-off. Service areas: Beşiktaş, Sütlüce, Sirkeci, Topkapı, Taksim, Eminönü, Kağıthane, Fatih, Laleli, Sultanahmet, Ortaköy and Beyoğlu.
extra.auto.75_yes_same_day_bookings_are_: Yes! Same-day bookings are available until 20:00 (1 hour before departure). Just message us and we'll check availability instantly.
extra.auto.76_yes_free_cancellation_is_a: Yes. Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the cruise (until 19:00). After that, please let us know on WhatsApp so we can assist you. Since there's no prepayment, the process is hassle-free.
extra.auto.77_between_23_30_and_00_00_if: between 23:30 and 00:00. If you booked hotel transfer, the same driver who picked you up will be waiting at the pier to take you back to your hotel.
extra.auto.78_it_can_get_cool_on_deck: it can get cool on deck
extra.auto.81_pay_on_the_boat_cash_or_ca: — pay on the boat (cash or card)

extra.tfill.35_discover_istanbul_s_iconi: Discover Istanbul's iconic landmarks under the daylight. Sail past the Maiden's Tower, Dolmabahce Palace, and Bosphorus Bridge.
extra.tfill.40_the_ultimate_bosphorus_ni: The ultimate Bosphorus night. 3-course dinner, live entertainment, and Istanbul's illuminated skyline from the water.
extra.tfill.43_write_or_call_us_we_ll_ha: Write or call us. We'll handle the rest.
extra.tfill.45_tell_us_the_date_number_o: Tell us the date, number of guests, and package (Standard or VIP).
extra.tfill.46_write_call_or_we_ll_call_: Write, Call, or We'll Call You
extra.tfill.47_message_or_call_whatever_: Message or call — whatever works for you. We respond quickly.
extra.tfill.48_show_up_pay_on_the_boat: Show Up & Pay on the Boat
extra.tfill.49_no_prepayment_needed_just: No prepayment needed. Just arrive at the pier, board your cruise, and pay onboard.
extra.tfill.55_enjoy_a_3_hour_bosphorus_: Enjoy a 3-hour Bosphorus night cruise with a full dinner, live Turkish entertainment, and stunning views of Istanbul's skyline.
extra.tfill.59_main_course_with_seasonal: Main course (with seasonal salad, choose one): salmon, sea bream, chicken, meatball, or vegetarian platter (falafel, roasted potatoes, bulgur pilaf, stewed vegetables & onion rings)
extra.tfill.62_whirling_dervish_show_5_f: Whirling Dervish show, 5 folk dances, belly dance, live music & DJ
extra.tfill.68_premium_dining_at_the_bes: Premium dining at the best table near the stage. Upgraded menu with premium mezes, steak options, and VIP service throughout the night.
extra.tfill.70_15_varieties_of_turkish_m: 15+ varieties of Turkish meze, served as a traditional spread
extra.tfill.71_main_course_with_seasonal: Main course (with seasonal salad, choose one): salmon, sea bream, chicken, meatball, beef tenderloin, rib-eye, or vegetarian platter (falafel, roasted potatoes, bulgur pilaf, stewed vegetables & onion rings)
extra.tfill.72_exact_meeting_location_wi: Exact meeting location will be shared via WhatsApp, Telegram or WeChat after booking.
extra.tfill.73_how_to_find_us_walking_di: How to find us — walking directions
extra.tfill.81_sail_past_the_maiden_s_to: Sail past the Maiden's Tower, Dolmabahçe Palace, Bosphorus Bridge, Beylerbeyi Palace, Ortaköy Mosque, and Rumeli Fortress. Departs from Kabataş at 21:00, returns between 23:30 and 00:00.
extra.tfill.84_10_types_of_meze_for_stan: 10 types of meze for Standard (15+ for VIP), choice of salmon/sea bass/chicken/meatball main course, and dessert with ice cream. Vegetarian menu available. VIP packages include rib-eye and filet mignon options, plus table near the stage.
extra.tfill.86_live_singer_dj_turkish_ni: Live singer, DJ & Turkish night dances
extra.tfill.88_optional_pickup_drop_off_: Optional pickup & drop-off from your hotel
extra.tfill.89_round_trip_hotel_pickup_a: Round-trip hotel pickup and drop-off available from Beşiktaş, Sütlüce, Sirkeci, Topkapı, Taksim, Eminönü, Kağıthane, Fatih, Laleli, Sultanahmet, Ortaköy and Beyoğlu areas. Available as an add-on when booking. Please share your hotel location with us.
extra.tfill.92_we_re_with_you_before_dur: We're with you before, during, and after your cruise. Message or call anytime — we respond instantly, 7 days a week, 24 hours a day.
extra.tfill.135__booked_last_minute_via_: "Booked last minute via WhatsApp. Response within minutes, confirmed instantly, paid on the boat. Smooth process, great night. Highly recommended."
extra.tfill.137__took_the_kids_the_folk_: "Took the kids. The folk dancers and the dervish show captivated them. Halal menu was respected, staff gave our family attentive care. A perfect Istanbul night."
extra.tfill.139__we_love_food_and_this_d: "We love food — and this delivered. Each plate arrived with thought, the meat was tender, the flowers on the table made the whole night feel curated. Best Istanbul meal."
extra.tfill.140__punctual_clean_boat_ver: "Punctual, clean boat, very friendly crew. Price-to-quality ratio is excellent. We'd come back on our next Istanbul visit."
extra.tfill.142__sailed_right_under_the_: "Sailed right under the Bosphorus Bridge lit in red — absolutely magical. Our phone shots came out like postcards. Worth it just for that moment."
extra.tfill.144__halal_menu_was_wonderfu: "Halal menu was wonderful. Staff answered our questions patiently. Perfect for Muslim travelers visiting Istanbul."
extra.tfill.146__took_this_from_the_deck: "Took this from the deck — the boat, the bridge, the city skyline all in one frame. Perfect Istanbul souvenir shot."
extra.tfill.148__from_boarding_to_the_la: "From boarding to the last course, everything was thoughtful. Food fresh, generous portions, the boat looked like a floating restaurant at night. Recommended."
extra.tfill.150__pure_istanbul_magic_the: "Pure Istanbul magic. The DJ after dinner kept us dancing until midnight. Incredible energy on the dance floor."
extra.tfill.152__we_danced_until_midnigh: "We danced until midnight. The DJ, the belly dance show, the live music — pure energy. Our friends from Istanbul said it was the best cruise they'd been on too."
extra.tfill.154__took_my_parents_for_the: "Took my parents for their 40th anniversary. They still talk about the dervish performance. Thank you for making it special."
extra.tfill.156__what_impressed_me_most_: "What impressed me most was the service — attentive without being intrusive. The hall looked elegant under the warm lights. Worth every euro."
extra.tfill.158__incredibly_organized_on: "Incredibly organized. On time, exactly as described, clean boat. In Japan we value this — they delivered."
extra.tfill.159__the_turkish_night_show_: "The Turkish night show was magical — costumes, colors, and the energy of the dancers. I caught this beautiful moment on camera."
extra.tfill.161__booked_the_morning_of_t: "Booked the morning of the cruise. Confirmed within 10 minutes. Paid cash on the boat. Could not be easier."
extra.tfill.163__every_dancer_brought_a_: "Every dancer brought a different story. The red-dressed performer in particular had such stage presence — we couldn't look away."
extra.tfill.169_we_help_you_choose_the_p: We help you choose the perfect package, answer all your questions, and confirm your reservation.
extra.tfill.171_we_check_on_you_during_t: We check on you during the cruise to make sure everything is perfect. Any issue? We handle it immediately.
extra.tfill.173_we_follow_up_for_your_fe: We follow up for your feedback and are always here if you want to book another experience in Istanbul.
extra.tfill.177_we_return_to_the_same_pi: We return to the same pier where we departed
extra.tfill.179_capture_the_last_moments: Capture the last moments of the Istanbul skyline
extra.tfill.181_if_you_booked_a_transfer: If you booked a transfer, your driver will be waiting at the pier
extra.tfill.183_take_the_magic_of_istanb: Take the magic of Istanbul's night with you
extra.tfill.186_what_cruise_tours_do_you: What cruise tours do you offer?
extra.tfill.189_all_packages_include_a_f: All packages include a full dinner with 7 varieties of Turkish meze, your choice of main course (fish, chicken, or meatball), and dessert. VIP packages feature a premium mixed grill platter with selected cuts. Vegetarian options are available on request.
extra.tfill.191_where_does_the_cruise_de: Where does the cruise depart and return?
extra.tfill.192_cruises_depart_from_kaba: Cruises depart from Kabataş pier at 21:00 and return to the same location between 23:00 and 00:00 (3-hour cruise). The exact meeting point will be shared via WhatsApp / Telegram / WeChat after booking.
extra.tfill.193_what_route_does_the_crui: What route does the cruise take?
extra.tfill.194_kabata_pier_dolmabah_e_p: Kabataş Pier → Dolmabahçe Palace → Çırağan Palace → Ortaköy Mosque → Bosphorus Bridge → Bebek → Rumeli Fortress → FSM Bridge → Beylerbeyi Palace → Üsküdar → Maiden's Tower (visible from distance) → Kabataş Pier. Route is for reference only. Itinerary may vary due to weather or sea conditions.
extra.tfill.195_how_close_are_the_tables: How close are the tables to the stage?
extra.tfill.196_our_boat_s_dining_hall_h: Our boat's dining hall has a panoramic Bosphorus view. No matter where you sit, you can enjoy the full view. The stage is also designed to be visible from every seat, so the shows can be watched easily. (VIP menus are seated closer to the stage.)
extra.tfill.197_what_kind_of_shows_and_e: What kind of shows and entertainment are there?
extra.tfill.198_the_cruise_features_live: The cruise features live singer performances, a traditional Turkish Night show with folk dances, belly dance, and DJ music. Entertainment continues uninterrupted until the end of the cruise.
